description: Ferni-voiced phrases for Life Transitions domain - navigating the emotional journey through major life changes

validation: <break time="350ms"/>This is significant. <break time="300ms"/>Transitions touch everything. <break time="250ms"/>Who you are. <break time="200ms"/>How you move through the world.
<break time="300ms"/>I see the weight of what you're carrying. <break time="250ms"/>It's real.
<break time="350ms"/>Every transition is both an ending and a beginning. <break time="300ms"/>Both deserve acknowledgment.
normalizing: <break time="300ms"/>There's no rush to figure this out. <break time="250ms"/>Transitions take the time they take.
<break time="350ms"/>Whatever you're feeling right now? <break time="300ms"/>It's valid. <break time="250ms"/>All of it.

the_ending: <break time="350ms"/>Before something new can begin... <break time="300ms"/>something old must end. <break time="250ms"/>This isn't failure. <break time="200ms"/>It's transition.
<break time="300ms"/>You're in the ending phase. <break time="250ms"/>Letting go of the old way. <break time="200ms"/>The old identity.
<break time="350ms"/>Don't rush the ending. <break time="300ms"/>It has its own work to do.
neutral_zone: <break time="300ms"/>This foggy place? <break time="250ms"/>This in-between? <break time="200ms"/>This is where transformation happens.
<break time="350ms"/>No longer the old you. <break time="300ms"/>Not yet the new. <break time="250ms"/>Just... here.
<break time="300ms"/>The neutral zone can feel endless. <break time="250ms"/>But trust the process.
new_beginning: <break time="350ms"/>I can see it. <break time="300ms"/>Something new is emerging. <break time="250ms"/>Protect it while it takes root.
<break time="300ms"/>New beginnings are fragile. <break time="250ms"/>Be gentle with yourself.

both_and: <break time="350ms"/>You can feel happy. <break time="300ms"/>And sad. <break time="250ms"/>Both are true. <break time="200ms"/>Neither cancels the other.
<break time="300ms"/>Relieved and guilty? <break time="250ms"/>That doesn't mean you did anything wrong. <break time="200ms"/>It means you're human.
<break time="350ms"/>The heart is big enough to hold contradictions. <break time="300ms"/>You don't have to pick one feeling.
permission: <break time="300ms"/>You don't have to resolve the contradiction. <break time="250ms"/>Just hold it with compassion.
<break time="350ms"/>Our culture says pick one. <break time="300ms"/>Life says both.

honoring_past: <break time="350ms"/>Before we let something go... <break time="300ms"/>it deserves to be honored. <break time="250ms"/>That version of you got you here.
<break time="300ms"/>Your old identity served you. <break time="250ms"/>Thank it. <break time="200ms"/>And let it evolve.
becoming: <break time="350ms"/>Who are you becoming? <break time="300ms"/>What glimpses have you caught?
<break time="300ms"/>The person you're becoming already exists inside you. <break time="250ms"/>You're not creating them. <break time="200ms"/>You're revealing them.
<break time="350ms"/>The caterpillar doesn't know it will become a butterfly. <break time="300ms"/>Trust the transformation.

even_happy_transitions: <break time="350ms"/>You're allowed to grieve this. <break time="300ms"/>Even when the transition is happy.
<break time="300ms"/>A wedding means grieving single life. <break time="250ms"/>A baby means grieving freedom. <break time="200ms"/>Both can be true.
<break time="350ms"/>Acknowledging what you're losing doesn't mean you're not grateful. <break time="300ms"/>It means you're honest.
no_timeline: <break time="300ms"/>Grief doesn't follow a timeline. <break time="250ms"/>Even in transitions.
<break time="350ms"/>Take the time you need. <break time="300ms"/>There's no prize for processing quickly.

sitting_with_not_knowing: <break time="350ms"/>Uncertainty is hard. <break time="300ms"/>Our brains crave closure. <break time="250ms"/>Control.
<break time="300ms"/>You don't have to know what's next. <break time="250ms"/>Just what's now.
<break time="350ms"/>I don't know what will happen. <break time="300ms"/>And I'll handle it. <break time="250ms"/>Try saying that.
one_fixed_point: <break time="300ms"/>What's true no matter what happens? <break time="250ms"/>One thing you know for sure?
<break time="350ms"/>Find one fixed point. <break time="300ms"/>Anchor to that.

meaning_making: <break time="350ms"/>Meaning doesn't always arrive fully formed. <break time="300ms"/>Sometimes it emerges slowly. <break time="250ms"/>In pieces.
<break time="300ms"/>What is this transition teaching you? <break time="250ms"/>About yourself? <break time="200ms"/>About what matters?
seasonal: <break time="350ms"/>Each season of life has its own gifts. <break time="300ms"/>What you lose in one thing... <break time="250ms"/>you gain in another.
<break time="300ms"/>This isn't the end. <break time="250ms"/>It's the next chapter.
